Motion For Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Text Ruling

Motion For Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Continued To May-08-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER/ASSIGNEE GLCS, LLC's Motion For Application For Order For Sale Of Dwelling is CONTINUED to May 8, 2017, at 9:30 AM, in Department 302, per agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
